selections.name: Judas Tree

selections.name: Oman
selections.reason: Proven synthetic form with a strong 2nd here last start over this distance.

selections.name: Pinamilloy
selections.reason: Solid recent form with a 2nd at Cranbourne, handles all conditions.

selections.name: Caption This
selections.reason: Has synthetic experience and draws the inside barrier to save ground.

danger_horse.name: Soulsease River

selections.name: Unstirred
selections.reason: Elite stable first starter, won Flemington jump-out, unexposed potential.

selections.name: Aqua Storm
selections.reason: Consistent form, wide draw a slight negative but has tactical speed.

selections.name: Charlotte's Web
selections.reason: Can bounce back from heavy track failure, solid 3rd on debut.

selections.name: Tasmanian Fox
selections.reason: Resuming, showed some ability last campaign and can run well fresh.

danger_horse.name: The Toronado Kid

selections.name: The Archer
selections.reason: Proven on synthetic recently with a solid 3rd here last start.

selections.name: Prince Of Sparta
selections.reason: Maher stable, expected to improve sharply second-up from the inside draw.

selections.name: Boulderoo
selections.reason: Forgive last start on slow ground, prior 2nd at Echuca was very solid.

selections.name: Rookery Nook
selections.reason: Fitter second-up, can improve off a moderate return.

danger_horse.name: Hopkins Star

selections.name: Majestic Choice
selections.reason: Good synthetic run last time finishing 4th here, sets up perfectly.

selections.name: Finnish Girl
selections.reason: Experienced mare, solid 4th here last time out over a shorter trip.

selections.name: Pride Of Mandy
selections.reason: Capable on best form, should be peaking third-up today.

selections.name: She's Ann Idea
selections.reason: First starter for Freedman stable, jump-out form is encouraging.

danger_horse.name: Show No Doubt
danger_horse.reason: Drawn the rail, can improve off recent wet track runs.

selections.name: Jaz Tycoon
selections.reason: Synthetic specialist, won here last start, overcomes weight penalty with class.

selections.name: Tradeworx
selections.reason: Solid 4th behind Jaz Tycoon last start, gets a weight swing today.

selections.name: Triple Oh
selections.reason: Finished 3rd behind the top pick last time, consistent and gets weight relief.

selections.name: Good Harmony
selections.reason: Solid 3rd at Pakenham Synthetic last start, handles the surface well.

danger_horse.name: All In Vain
danger_horse.reason: Forgive last start, prior synthetic form at this track was solid.

selections.name: Tommyess
selections.reason: Proven synthetic form, excellent 2nd here last start, ready to win.

selections.name: Somersault
selections.reason: Won last start at Geelong, progressive filly with a great draw.

selections.name: Electric Elvis
selections.reason: Very consistent with multiple placings, strong synthetic form.

selections.name: Deepseek
selections.reason: Promising type resuming, won maiden well before the break.

danger_horse.name: Wild Roses Grow

selections.name: Cumboogle
selections.reason: Flying on this track and distance, chasing a hat-trick of wins here.

selections.name: Orlabent

selections.name: Jennyanydots
selections.reason: Classy mare dropping in grade, strong late closer if pace is hot.

selections.name: Meisho

danger_horse.name: Martial Music

selections.name: Queen Beira

selections.name: Shooter Mcgavin
selections.reason: Consistent but carries a massive weight, still a major threat.

selections.name: Eau De Cologne
selections.reason: Won here last time, wide draw is the only concern.

selections.name: Forever Jeune
